violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. PIC in the process of obtaining food safety certification. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026

A hose is connected to the faucet at the (mop sink). This faucet is lacking a backflow prevention device. An approved backflow prevention device is required in order to prevent backflow of a solid, liquid, or gas contaminant into the water supply at each point of use at a food establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026

Currently, the establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered/licensed with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection (Previous Certified Food Safety Manager no longer working on site). Application printed and left with the PIC at the time of inspection. Application to be submitted as soon as possible. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the bleach sanitizing solution for the 3 Bay Sink (Used if the dish machine was to stop working properly). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener was placed into dish washer. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2023
